nasb.text: But the man from whom the demons had gone out was begging Him that he might accompany Him; but He sent him away, saying,

esv.text: The man from whom the demons had gone begged that he might be with him, but Jesus sent him away, saying,

cnv.text: 鬼已經離開的那人求耶穌，要跟他在一起；但耶穌打發他回去，說：

ccb.text: 那从前被鬼附身的人恳求跟耶稣同行，耶稣却对他说：

csbs.text: 鬼魔所离开的那人央求耶稣，要和他在一起，但耶稣让他走，说：
